LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DIRECT CAPITAL A DIVISION OF CIT BANK, N.A.'S APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION AS TO DEFENDANT XING LUN DU. NO APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND PLAINTIFF HAS ESTABLISHED THE PROBABLE VALIDITY OF THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO POSSESSION OF THE PROPERTY AND THAT PROBABLE CAUSE EXIST TO FIND THE PROPERTY AT 1350 MARIN STREET, A, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124. THE REQUIREMENT OF THE PLAINTIFF'S UNDERTAKING IS WAIVED BECAUSE DEFENDANT HAS NO INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY. DEFENDANT'S UNDERTAKING PURSUANT TO CODE CIV. PROC. 515.020 (B) IS SET AT $250,000. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A WRIT OF POSSESSION IN CONFORMITY WITH THE REQUIREMENTS OF CODE CIV. PROC. 512.080. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-10-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Hesti Cabinet Co Inc., Xing Lun Du and Zhong Hong Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Adriana Robles, CSR #14212. Telephone: 415-551-0332. Email: arobles@sftc.org.

Amanda N Ferns, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Direct Capital, a Division of CIT Bank, N.A.
No appearance by defendants Hesti Cabinet Co Inc., Xing Lun Du or Zhong Hong Inc.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract, Open Book and Account Stated was filed on March 21, 2019.
Substitute service on defendant Hesti Cabinet Co Inc., occurred on April 1, 2019 and was effectuated on April 12, 2019.
Substitute service on defendant Zhong Hong Inc. occurred on April 1, 2019 and was effectuated on April 12, 2019.
Substitute service on defendant Xing Lun Du occurred on April 5, 2019 and was effectuated on April 20, 2019.
Default as to all three defendants was entered on June 12, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on June 12, 2019.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on August 20, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Direct Capital, a Division of CIT Bank, N.A., and against the default defendants Hesti Cabinet Co Inc., Xing Lun Du and Zhong Hong Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $146,285.55.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,566.23.
Attorney Fees - $5,495.00.
Costs - $825.00.

Total - $156,171.78.

Additionally, plaintiff Direct Capital, a Division of CIT Bank, N.A. is entitled to possession of one (1) Homag Edgebanding Machine, Model: Ambition 1440 FCG Highflex At, Serial #0-261-09-3889. Defendants Hesti Cabinet Co Inc., Xing Lun Du and Zhong Hong Inc. are ordered to turn over said property to plaintiff, forthwith.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-22-2019 Continued To Sep-10-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2019 Continued To Dec-18-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

NOTICE OF APPLICATION OF WRIT OF POSSESSION AND HEARING
Off Calendar May-15-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DIRECT CAPITAL A DIVISION OF CIT BANK, N.A.'S APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION as to Defendant Xing Lun Du

GRANTED. No opposition filed and plaintiff has established the probable validity of the plaintiff's claim to possession of the property and that probable cause exist to find the property at 1350 Marin Street, A, San Francisco, CA 94124. The requirement of the plaintiff's undertaking is waived because defendant has no interest in the property. Defendant's undertaking pursuant to Code Civ. Proc. 515.020 (b) is set at $250,000.

Plaintiff to prepare and submit a writ of possession in conformity with the requirements of Code Civ. Proc. 512.080.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)
